prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on furan (9 atoms: O, C×4, H×4) using DFT at the tier 'standard' level — B3LYP/def2-TZVP — in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz file (no re-optimization; single-point DFT//input geometry). Exact four-center integrals used (density fitting NOT enabled). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Key results:
  HOMO energy   = −6.3597638 eV  (index 17)
  LUMO energy   = −0.1024036 eV  (index 18)
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV   ← headline value

Global reactivity descriptors (Koopmans' approximation):
  Vertical IP            = 6.3597638 eV
  Vertical EA            = 0.1024036 eV
  Electronegativity χ    = 3.2310837 eV
  Chemical hardness η    = 3.1286801 eV
  Chemical softness S    = 0.3196236 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity index = 1.6684195 eV

Total electronic energy = −230.11429 Hartree (−6261.7289 eV).

Output JSON: furan_frontier_dft.json
CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
